name: S and J School Employees
description_short: S And J School Employees Federal Credit Union is a community credit union in Wintersville, OH serving school employees with $2.95M in assets and basic financial services.
description_long: S And J School Employees Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union (NCUA Charter #17331) located in Wintersville, Ohio, serving a niche community of school employees. Founded to serve this specific occupational group, the institution operates as a traditional credit union with modest asset size of $2.95M and capital of $328K as of March 2026. The credit union offers standard deposit and loan products typical of community credit unions, with an asset mix heavily weighted toward consumer loans (63%) and other financial products (37%). Members can access basic checking and savings accounts, personal loans, and other traditional banking services through their Main Street location and phone banking options. As a federally chartered credit union, S And J School Employees maintains NCUA oversight and regulatory compliance. Their net capital ratio of 11.11% and leverage ratio of 11.11% indicate excellent capitalization levels relative to industry standards. The institution competes with several regional credit unions including Wright-Patt, Kemba Financial, and Superior Credit Union, positioning itself as a smaller community alternative. While the institution maintains solid capitalization, recent financial trends present concerns. Asset growth has declined 6.70% over one year and 4.61% over five years, suggesting membership or loan volume challenges. Profitability metrics are fair at best, with operating profit to average assets at 0.74% and return on average assets of 0.71%. Non-performing loans at 8.63% of capital indicate moderate asset quality issues. This is a stable but slowly contracting institution best suited for existing school employee members rather than a growth-oriented financial partner.
services: Savings and deposit accounts with NCUA insurance protection
Share certificates (CDs implied by banking services)
Loan products with 6.83% net interest spread
In-person banking at Wintersville, OH location
Member accounts and financial management services
pros: Excellent capitalization with 11.11% net capital ratio, well above regulatory minimums
Federally chartered with NCUA oversight and deposit insurance protection
Specialized focus on school employees creates niche community alignment
Fair liquidity position with 25.92% liquidity ratio supporting member withdrawals
Low charge-offs history at 0.00% in most recent year
Established local presence with 40+ years of implied history (charter #17331)
Competitive net interest spread of 6.83% provides reasonable lending rates
cons: Declining asset base with 6.70% one-year contraction and 4.61% five-year decline suggests shrinking membership or loan portfolio
Fair profitability at 0.71% ROA and 0.74% operating profit margin indicates limited earnings capacity
Non-performing loans at 8.63% of capital above industry standards, reflecting moderate credit quality concerns
Limited scale with only $2.95M in total assets constrains service offerings and competitive capabilities
High overhead efficiency ratio of 88.44% suggests operational inefficiencies relative to peers
best_for: Current and retired school employees in the Wintersville, OH area with community ties
Members seeking NCUA-insured savings and checking accounts with local relationship banking
Borrowers needing consumer loans from a community-focused lender with personal service
diagnosis: S And J School Employees Federal Credit Union is best for existing school employees in the Wintersville area seeking stable, NCUA-insured banking with personalized community service. Primary caveat: the institution's declining asset base, modest profitability, and moderate non-performing loan levels suggest it is a maintenance-mode operation rather than a growth institution, making it less suitable for members seeking cutting-edge products or robust service expansion.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: S And J School Employees Federal Credit Union in Wintersville, OH serves school employees with checking, savings, and loan services.
